body:
## Matching Engine Results — Romans 15:13 Capital LLC

**Profile parsed and run through the full 32-program catalog.**

---

### Summary

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Programs recommended | **27 of 32** |
| Realistic total value | **$218,900** |
| Max possible value | **$1,963,280** |
| Already have (excluded) | PostHog ($50K), Mercury |
| Ineligible | 1 (Visa Startup – fintech-only) |
| Conflicts (skipped) | 2 (Amplitude, Mixpanel – conflict with PostHog) |

---

## Priority 1: Cloud Hosting Credits (Replace Render)

The board member's #1 ask is AWS/cloud credits to replace Render. Best options:

| # | Program | Realistic Value | Approval | Apply Link |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **DigitalOcean Hatch** | $10K–$100K | ~14 days | https://do.co/hatch |
| 2 | **AWS Activate** | $1K–$100K | ~7 days | https://aws.amazon.com/activate |
| 3 | **Google Cloud for Startups** | $2K–$200K | ~5 days | https://cloud.google.com/startup |
| 4 | **Microsoft for Startups (Azure)** | $1K–$150K | ~3 days | https://startups.microsoft.com |

**Cloud Stack application order:**
1. Apply **Microsoft for Startups** first (~3 day approval, also covers Azure OpenAI for AI tokens)
2. Apply **Google Cloud** next (~5 days)
3. Apply **DigitalOcean Hatch** — best direct Render replacement for Flask/containerized workloads. BadgeTrack live product strengthens the application.
4. Apply **AWS Activate** (Founders tier, self-apply, no sponsor needed)

All four stack cleanly — no conflicts. Combined realistic cloud value: **~$104K+**

---

## Priority 2: AI Token Credits (10B+ tokens/month burn)

With >3B OpenAI tokens + >10B Cursor tokens monthly, AI credits are critical.

| # | Program | Realistic Value | Approval | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Brex Startup Rewards** | varies | ~1 day (instant) | Anthropic API credits available directly via Brex portal |
| 2 | **Y Combinator Startup School** | $50K–$500K deal set | ~1 day (free) | Unlocks AWS $25K, Brex $75K spend limit |
| 3 | **Microsoft for Startups (Azure)** | $1K–$150K | ~3 days | Azure OpenAI Service included = GPT-4 at enterprise pricing |
| 4 | **Hugging Face for Startups** | $1K–$10K | ~14 days | Replace paid API with open-source models |
| 5 | **Anthropic Claude API Credits** | $25–$5K | ~1 day | Direct via console or Brex portal |
| 6 | **OpenAI Startup Credits** | $2.5K–$25K | ~7 days | Requires partner sponsor — Azure path is better |

**AI Stack application order:**
1. Sign up for **YC Startup School** first (free, instant, unlocks downstream deals)
2. Open **Brex** account (instant approval, immediate Anthropic credits via Brex portal, $75K limit via YC SUS)
3. Apply **Microsoft for Startups** (Azure OpenAI covers GPT-4 quota at scale)
4. Apply **Hugging Face** (switch non-latency-critical inference to open-source)

---

## Priority 3: Affiliate Links Strategy

Programs from this list with notable referral/affiliate programs:

| Program | Affiliate Opportunity | Est. Payout |
|---|---|---|
| **Mercury** (already have) | Mercury referral link — share with founders | ~$200/signup |
| **Brex** | Referral program for businesses | ~$250–500/signup |
| **Ramp** | Referral cashback | $250+/business |
| **Relay** | Referral program | $50–100/signup |
| **DigitalOcean** | Affiliate at digitalocean.com/referral | $25/signup |
| **Cloudflare** | Partner/affiliate network | Revenue share |
| **Supabase** | Affiliate program | Revenue share |

**Affiliate setup steps:**
1. Generate Mercury referral link immediately (already have account — free money)
2. After opening Brex/Ramp/Relay, generate referral links for each before sharing
3. After applying DigitalOcean Hatch, join their affiliate program separately
4. Track all links in a single sheet before embedding in products
5. Every app built (Yard Sale app, Trading Agent, Get Out of Town Directory, etc.) should embed affiliate links via Postmark email flows and landing pages

---

## Full Prioritized Checklist (27 Programs)

Ordered by matching score:

| # | Score | Program | Realistic Value | Approval | Apply |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 151 | Y Combinator Startup School | $50K deal set | ~1 day | https://startupschool.org |
| 2 | 151 | Brex Startup Rewards | varies | ~1 day | https://brex.com/startups |
| 3 | 142 | DigitalOcean Hatch | $25K | ~14 days | https://do.co/hatch |
| 4 | 140 | Stripe Atlas Perks | $20K–$50K | ~3 days | https://stripe.com/atlas |
| 5 | 136 | AWS Activate | $5K | ~7 days | https://aws.amazon.com/activate |
| 6 | 136 | Google Cloud for Startups | $2K | ~5 days | https://cloud.google.com/startup |

| 14 | 108 | Auth0 / Okta for Startups | $2K | ~5 days | https://auth0.com/startups |
| 15 | 102 | Twilio Startup Program | $2.5K | ~3 days | https://twilio.com/startups |
| 16 | 102 | Cloudflare for Startups | $2.4K | ~7 days | https://cloudflare.com/forstartups |
| 17 | 102 | Figma for Startups | $2.4K | ~5 days | https://figma.com/startups |
| 18 | 92 | Intercom Early Stage Program | $2K | ~7 days | https://intercom.com/early-stage |
| 19 | 92 | Supabase Startup Program | $300 | ~5 days | https://supabase.com/pricing |
| 20 | 90 | Vercel Startup Program | $240 | ~3 days | https://vercel.com/pricing#startup |
| 21 | 90 | Notion for Startups | $600 | ~5 days | https://notion.so/startups |
| 22 | 88 | MongoDB Atlas for Startups | $500 | ~5 days | https://mongodb.com/startups |
| 23 | 88 | JetBrains for Startups | $1.2K | ~10 days | https://jetbrains.com/lp/startup-program |
| 24 | 84 | HubSpot for Startups | $10K | ~7 days | https://hubspot.com/startups |
| 25 | 84 | OpenAI Startup Credits | $2.5K | ~7 days | https://platform.openai.com |
| 26 | 78 | GitHub for Startups | $4.8K | ~7 days | https://github.com/solutions/startups |
| 27 | 50 | Relay Business Banking | $0 | ~3 days | https://relayfi.com |

Note: Programs 24–26 require a VC/accelerator sponsor. Best path: apply YC SUS first, gain access to partner network, unlock sponsor-gated deals.

---

## Stacking Opportunities (6 Identified)

1. **Cloud Infra Mega-Stack** — AWS + GCP + Azure + DigitalOcean — ~$104K+, all non-conflicting
2. **AI API Coverage Stack** — Brex + Anthropic + OpenAI + Azure + HuggingFace — multi-provider coverage
3. **Stripe Atlas Compound** — $500 Atlas fee unlocks $20K+ bundled perks (AWS $1K, GCP $2K, HubSpot free)
4. **YC Startup School Unlock** — Free enrollment unlocks AWS $25K, Brex $75K, Cloudflare deals
5. **Dev Platform Stack** — GitHub + Linear + Vercel + Supabase + Cloudflare — ~$12K+ tooling
6. **Banking & Finance Foundation** — Mercury (have) + Brex + Ramp + Relay — spend rewards + perk portals

---

## Recommended Application Order

**Week 1 (instant/1-3 day approvals):**
- [ ] YC Startup School (free, instant — unlocks downstream deals)
- [ ] Brex (instant — Anthropic credits via portal)
- [ ] Microsoft for Startups (3 days — Azure + Azure OpenAI)
- [ ] Anthropic Claude API Credits (via console or Brex portal)
- [ ] Linear, Vercel, Relay (all under 3 days)

**Week 2 (3-7 day approvals):**
- [ ] Google Cloud for Startups (5 days)
- [ ] Stripe Atlas (3 days — $500 fee, unlocks $20K+ perks)
- [ ] Ramp (3 days — add spend rewards card)
- [ ] Supabase, Notion, Auth0, Figma, Twilio (3–5 days each)

**Week 3 (slower approvals):**
- [ ] DigitalOcean Hatch (14 days — primary Render replacement)
- [ ] AWS Activate (7 days)
- [ ] Datadog, Segment, Cloudflare, Intercom (5–7 days each)
- [ ] Hugging Face (14 days)
- [ ] JetBrains (10 days)

**After YC SUS / sponsor unlock:**
- [ ] HubSpot for Startups
- [ ] OpenAI Startup Credits
- [ ] GitHub for Startups

---

_Profile: LLC (2yr, bootstrapped, team 1, ARR ~$25K, deployed product, web+ai_ml+backend stack, Mercury banking, PostHog already enrolled)_
_Engine: matcher.py v1 | Catalog: programs.json (32 programs, 84 stacking rules)_
